Hey, this is Russell and I want to welcome you to the High Ticket Secrets Members Area. Now I'm actually here late at night. Tomorrow is the first time that I've ever actually presented this information on a webinar and I'm kind of finishing out the Members Area right now. And it's interesting, I got kind of mixed emotions with sharing this stuff with everybody. As you probably, if you watched the webinar, you probably heard some of the back story. We started our first call center almost seven or eight years ago now and we launched it. We built it up, initially started with two people. We built it up to over 60 people and they were pros and they're cons of it. There were a lot of money we made but also just because of the stress and the overhead a lot of issues we had. And we built it up big and then we eventually shut it down. And I kind of walked away from it for two or three years and just didn't sell high ticket stuff at all. I think I had some kind of internal fear or something and it wasn't until about a year ago we decided, hey, you know, what we were doing was really good. We made a lot of money. We helped a lot of people. How can we do that again but not in a way that I need to have 60 sales people? And so we kind of went on this mission to try to figure out the right way to do it. And I literally bought, you know, you probably see there are a lot of people out there selling high ticket courses, how to sell high ticket coaching or consulting. So I pretty much bought all the different courses, see how they were doing it. And it was interesting because while all of them were kind of good, none of them were great. A lot of them, the majority of them, they wanted me to be on the phone selling. And I don't know about you but as the entrepreneur of my business, I just don't have time to be on the phone selling people all day long. I got a lot of other things happening. I'm building websites and projects and doing a lot of stuff and it just, it didn't work for me. So I didn't want to, and also like I'm kind of a shy person, you know. I don't mind selling from a webinar or from a seminar but I'm not good on a phone and I didn't want that to be what I did. And so we kind of walked away from that. And some other people would, they tell you, yeah, go on the phone and sell high ticket stuff. But they didn't really give you a script or anything that was proven. It was more just like, get on the phone and talk to people. And you know, it was, again, it was just this kind of like struggle. We couldn't really figure it out. So finally I thought, you know, there's got to be a better way. And so we sat down and mapped out a bunch of ideas and set up some sales funnels and started driving traffic to it. And at first leads started coming in. We were really excited. I brought in two people who were amazing sales people and we put them on the phones and they literally spent two or three weeks dialing through leads and couldn't close a single person at the point where I almost just walked away from it and just said, you know, this isn't even worth the, worth the headaches. And then, and then I decided to call up one of my buddies, someone who'd worked with me before, one of the main guys on my old sales floor. I said, Hey, Robbie, can you come in and just, and just spend a day with with these guys and just see if it's salvageable. See if, you know, we're using the same strips we used to have. They're just not working. I don't get it. So Robbie came in and literally spent four hours with them on a, on a Friday and the next day was Saturday and the next day they closed $36,000 in sales. Now up to that point over the three or four weeks prior, they hadn't made any sales. And remember, just I had this breath of relief like, wow, okay, this can work again there. This is possible. And, and from there we started moving forward and literally since that, that point moving forward, you know, I'm not big in like sharing income claims and all that kind of stuff, but, you know, we're, we're doing every two weeks over six figures and it's just kind of this new income stream of my business literally every two weeks and other six figures coming in and it didn't come from us, you know, building a huge call center having a ton of people. They came from adding two pages to ourselves funnel and, and we put these two pages in, people would come, they would apply, we call them on the phone and we follow the script and it just works and works really, really well. Now finally after, after we got this thing rolling and it started making a bunch of money, I went back to Robbie and, and begged him to come start working with us again. Lucky for me, he came back and, and you know, a lot of people were, were coaching with right now and a lot of people we work with in our high ticket program. They have coaching programs and they're trying to develop ones and, and they kept coming back and, you know, asking like, how do I, I want to do a call center like you, you know, I want to add an extra $50,000 a week or more to my business. And at first I was kind of, I was kind of reserved about it. You know, I think we had figured out something that nobody else had. So we didn't share it for a long time. And finally people started offering literally like crazy amounts of money. We've had more than one person now who has paid us $100,000 to actually fly out to their office, hire sales team for them, go ahead and, and, and have Robbie come in and work with a guy for three or four days, get them selling, get them closing deals, me working on building out their sales funnel and driving leads. And, and, and literally the cheapest we've sold this for so far has been $100,000. And then we actually went and we filmed Robbie training because what happened, we would go into these companies and we would set everything up and then we'd walk away. And at first these, you know, if they had two or three salespeople, they would do really, really good. But sometimes obviously there's turnover, someone would leave and then they didn't have any way to train these people and new people are coming in. And so what we did is we spent two days filming, filming this entire product. And, and you know, there's not a ton of, I mean, there, there's, you know, two days worth of content here, but it's not like you're, you're going to listen to, you know, 50 hours of audio or video. It wasn't created to be that way. The high ticket secret system was, was created to be a resource for, for entrepreneurs, for business owners. And so there's some videos that are for you for the entrepreneur who invest in this to watch, understand how to set up your sales floor. Like literally we set up ourselves for about $100, our new one. And so we're going to show you how to do that. And, and we're going to show you how to set up your commission scales and all the stuff that you as the entrepreneur need to know. But then we've got a bunch of videos to actually train your salespeople on the scripts. And so what's cool is let's say you, you hire some people, you give them the scripts, you know, they're going to be like our people, they're going to try it, they're going to, they're not going to do very well. But just like what happened to us, you give your salespeople the videos of Robbie training them, they watch it and they go out there and the next day they'll be successful. And then I would recommend using this as a tool in your business where you don't just have them come once or you know, listen to it once. But I would say every Monday have them watch the video on the set script every Monday, watch this, this, the closed script and just kind of keep going back and forth because you know, as they master these techniques, literally it's just, it's just tons and tons and tons of free money you're adding to your business without even, without doing that much extra work. And so that's kind of what that's kind of what this program is. So again, it's there's a couple different sections, one sections for you as the entrepreneur to figure out how to set it up. We're going to talk about how to create your back end high ticket programs. And then we're going to give you the videos that you can use to train your your first salespeople and then as new people come in, show them the videos, they'll get trained and you can keep growing and really have a stable high ticket business. And so that's what this course is. I'm excited. Like I said, the one time we ever sold this in the past was for $100,000. The price for this was a lot less. And I just want to make sure you guys understand the value in this. I don't want you going through this and be like, you know, I don't see how this is going to work for me. I promise you that if you implement this, it works. People are paying it's $100,000 to implement it right now plus a percentage of what they make off it.
